Part.Source:
Event Start
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardSteps = new()
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'BemVindo' &WizardStep.Title = 'Bem Vindo' &WizardStep.Description = 'Bem Vindo' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Mdfe' &WizardStep.Title = 'MDF-e' &WizardStep.Description = 'MDF-e' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Documentos' &WizardStep.Title = 'Documentos' &WizardStep.Description = 'Documentos' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Percurso' &WizardStep.Title = 'Percurso' &WizardStep.Description = 'Percurso' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Transporte' &WizardStep.Title = 'Transporte' &WizardStep.Description = 'Transporte' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Modal' &WizardStep.Title = 'Modal' &WizardStep.Description = 'Modal' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Transmitir' &WizardStep.Title = 'Transmitir' &WizardStep.Description = 'Transmitir' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
If &CurrentStep.IsEmpty() &CurrentStepAux = !'BemVindo' &WebSession.Remove(&Pgmname + !'_Data') Else &CurrentStepAux = &CurrentStep EndIf Do 'LoadWizardStepWC' StepTitles.Object = WizardStepsArrowWC.Create(&WizardSteps, &CurrentStepAux)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoRetorno'
WWMDFE.Call()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadWizardStepWC'
iF 1=2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case &CurrentStepAux = !'BemVindo' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01BemVindo.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Mdfe' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Mdfe.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Documentos' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Documentos.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Percurso' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Percurso.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Transporte' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Transporte.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Modal' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Modal.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Transmitir' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Transmitir.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else Do Case Case &CurrentStepAux = !'BemVindo' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01BemVindo.Create('WPMDFE01_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Mdfe' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Mdfe.Create('WPMDFE01_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Documentos' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Documentos.Create('WPMDFE01_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Percurso' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Percurso.Create('WPMDFE01_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Modal' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Modal.Create('WPMDFE01_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Transporte' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Transporte.Create('WPMDFE01_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Transmitir' WizardStepWC.Object = WPMDFe01Transmitir.Create('WPMDFE01_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) EndCase
EndIf
EndSub
